The palette for U-KREAT is as follows:

- #D6E1E6
- #557A8B
- #8DCE94
- #2C6633
- #122B15

The palette can be viewed [here](https://coolors.co/d6e1e6-557a8b-8dce94-2c6633-122b15).

---

The standard font for U-KREAT is [Euphemia](https://fontsgeek.com/fonts/Euphemia-Regular) (or Euphemia UCAS on MacOS).

---

The visual design for U-KREAT was developed by Roemer Janse and Ellis Oortwijn.

[Back to resources](https://ukreat.github.io/resources.html)
